mapper.sql: aart.abnromal_attendance_record_id, aart.employee_id, aart.date, aart.last_paragraph_end_time, aart.first_time_from, aart.first_time_to, aart.extend1_time_flag, aart.second_time_from, aart.second_time_to, aart.extend2_time_flag, aart.third_time_from, aart.third_time_to, aart.extend3_time_flag, aart.next_period_start_time, aart.rest_flag, aart.no_scheduling, aart.rest_day_clock, aart.all_day_no_clock, aart.office_time_clock, aart.no_clock_in, aart.abnormal_clock_in_time, aart.no_clock_after_work, aart.alt_first_time_from, aart.alt_first_time_to, aart.alt_extend1_time_flag, aart.alt_second_time_from, aart.alt_second_time_to, aart.alt_extend2_time_flag, aart.alt_third_time_from, aart.alt_third_time_to, aart.alt_extend3_time_flag, aart.alt_rest_day_flag, aart.attribute1, aart.attribute2, aart.attribute3, aart.attribute4, aart.attribute5, aart.id, aart.update_time, aart.update_by, aart.create_time, aart.create_by

${tAlias}.abnromal_attendance_record_id as ${tAlias}_abnromal_attendance_record_id, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.date as ${tAlias}_date, ${tAlias}.last_paragraph_end_time as ${tAlias}_last_paragraph_end_time, ${tAlias}.first_time_from as ${tAlias}_first_time_from, ${tAlias}.first_time_to as ${tAlias}_first_time_to, ${tAlias}.extend1_time_flag as ${tAlias}_extend1_time_flag, ${tAlias}.second_time_from as ${tAlias}_second_time_from, ${tAlias}.second_time_to as ${tAlias}_second_time_to, ${tAlias}.extend2_time_flag as ${tAlias}_extend2_time_flag, ${tAlias}.third_time_from as ${tAlias}_third_time_from, ${tAlias}.third_time_to as ${tAlias}_third_time_to, ${tAlias}.extend3_time_flag as ${tAlias}_extend3_time_flag, ${tAlias}.next_period_start_time as ${tAlias}_next_period_start_time, ${tAlias}.rest_flag as ${tAlias}_rest_flag, ${tAlias}.no_scheduling as ${tAlias}_no_scheduling, ${tAlias}.rest_day_clock as ${tAlias}_rest_day_clock, ${tAlias}.all_day_no_clock as ${tAlias}_all_day_no_clock, ${tAlias}.office_time_clock as ${tAlias}_office_time_clock, ${tAlias}.no_clock_in as ${tAlias}_no_clock_in, ${tAlias}.abnormal_clock_in_time as ${tAlias}_abnormal_clock_in_time, ${tAlias}.no_clock_after_work as ${tAlias}_no_clock_after_work, ${tAlias}.alt_first_time_from as ${tAlias}_alt_first_time_from, ${tAlias}.alt_first_time_to as ${tAlias}_alt_first_time_to, ${tAlias}.alt_extend1_time_flag as ${tAlias}_alt_extend1_time_flag, ${tAlias}.alt_second_time_from as ${tAlias}_alt_second_time_from, ${tAlias}.alt_second_time_to as ${tAlias}_alt_second_time_to, ${tAlias}.alt_extend2_time_flag as ${tAlias}_alt_extend2_time_flag, ${tAlias}.alt_third_time_from as ${tAlias}_alt_third_time_from, ${tAlias}.alt_third_time_to as ${tAlias}_alt_third_time_to, ${tAlias}.alt_extend3_time_flag as ${tAlias}_alt_extend3_time_flag, ${tAlias}.alt_rest_day_flag as ${tAlias}_alt_rest_day_flag, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by
mapper.insert: insert into ac_attendance_record_temp (abnromal_attendance_record_id, employee_id, date, last_paragraph_end_time, first_time_from, first_time_to, extend1_time_flag, second_time_from, second_time_to, extend2_time_flag, third_time_from, third_time_to, extend3_time_flag, next_period_start_time, rest_flag, no_scheduling, rest_day_clock, all_day_no_clock, office_time_clock, no_clock_in, abnormal_clock_in_time, no_clock_after_work, alt_first_time_from, alt_first_time_to, alt_extend1_time_flag, alt_second_time_from, alt_second_time_to, alt_extend2_time_flag, alt_third_time_from, alt_third_time_to, alt_extend3_time_flag, alt_rest_day_flag, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, update_time, update_by, create_time, create_by) values (#{abnromalAttendanceRecordId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{date,jdbcType=DATE}, #{lastParagraphEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{firstTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, #{firstTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, #{extend1TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{secondTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, #{secondTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, #{extend2TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{thirdTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, #{thirdTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, #{extend3TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{nextPeriodStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{restFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{noScheduling,jdbcType=BIT}, #{restDayClock,jdbcType=BIT}, #{allDayNoClock,jdbcType=BIT}, #{officeTimeClock,jdbcType=BIT}, #{noClockIn,jdbcType=BIT}, #{abnormalClockInTime,jdbcType=BIT}, #{noClockAfterWork,jdbcType=BIT}, #{altFirstTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, #{altFirstTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, #{altExtend1TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{altSecondTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, #{altSecondTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, #{altExtend2TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{altThirdTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, #{altThirdTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, #{altExtend3TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{altRestDayFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})

insert into ac_attendance_record_temp (abnromal_attendance_record_id, employee_id, date, last_paragraph_end_time, first_time_from, first_time_to, extend1_time_flag, second_time_from, second_time_to, extend2_time_flag, third_time_from, third_time_to, extend3_time_flag, next_period_start_time, rest_flag, no_scheduling, rest_day_clock, all_day_no_clock, office_time_clock, no_clock_in, abnormal_clock_in_time, no_clock_after_work, alt_first_time_from, alt_first_time_to, alt_extend1_time_flag, alt_second_time_from, alt_second_time_to, alt_extend2_time_flag, alt_third_time_from, alt_third_time_to, alt_extend3_time_flag, alt_rest_day_flag, update_time, update_by, create_time, create_by) select #{recordId, jdbcType=BIGINT},temp.pejs_employee_id,temp.need_date ,null, temp.ada_first_time_from, temp.ada_first_time_to, temp.ada_extend1_time_flag, temp.ada_second_time_from, temp.ada_second_time_to, temp.ada_extend2_time_flag, temp.ada_third_time_from, temp.ada_third_time_to, temp.ada_extend3_time_flag, null, temp.rest_flag , 0, 0, 0, 0, 0 ,0 ,0 , temp.ada_first_time_from, temp.ada_first_time_to, temp.ada_extend1_time_flag, temp.ada_second_time_from, temp.ada_second_time_to, temp.ada_extend2_time_flag, temp.ada_third_time_from, temp.ada_third_time_to, temp.ada_extend3_time_flag, temp.rest_flag, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} from (select pe.id as pejs_employee_id,
, ada.id AS ada_id, ada.dept_id AS ada_dept_id, ada.regime_id AS ada_regime_id, ada.calendar_header_id AS ada_calendar_header_id, case when acl.day_off_flag = 1 then null else ada.first_time_from end AS ada_first_time_from, case when acl.day_off_flag = 1 then null else ada.first_time_to end AS ada_first_time_to, case when acl.day_off_flag = 1 then null else ada.extend1_time_flag end AS ada_extend1_time_flag, case when acl.day_off_flag = 1 then null else ada.second_time_from end AS ada_second_time_from, case when acl.day_off_flag = 1 then null else ada.second_time_to end AS ada_second_time_to, case when acl.day_off_flag = 1 then null else ada.extend2_time_flag end AS ada_extend2_time_flag, case when acl.day_off_flag = 1 then null else ada.third_time_from end AS ada_third_time_from, case when acl.day_off_flag = 1 then null else ada.third_time_to end AS ada_third_time_to, case when acl.day_off_flag = 1 then null else ada.extend3_time_flag end AS ada_extend3_time_flag, ada.take_effect_date AS ada_take_effect_date, ada.invalid_date AS ada_invalid_date, ada.attribute1 AS ada_attribute1, ada.attribute2 AS ada_attribute2, ada.attribute3 AS ada_attribute3, ada.enabled_flag AS ada_enabled_flag, ada.create_by AS ada_create_by, ada.create_time AS ada_create_time, ada.update_by AS ada_update_by, ada.update_time AS ada_update_time ,acl.day_off_flag as rest_flag, acl.now_date as need_date
from
pm_employee pe join pm_employee_job_snapshot pejs on pe.id = pejs.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 join fnd_dept_snapshot fds on pejs.dept_id = fds.dept_id and pejs.date = fds.date join ac_dept_attendance ada on fds.attendance_id = ada.id join ac_calendar_header ach on ada.calendar_header_id = ach.id join ac_calendar_line acl on ach.id = acl.calendar_header_id and acl.now_date = pejs.date where acl.now_date BETWEEN #{startDate, jdbcType=DATE} and #{endDate, jdbcType=DATE} and pe.work_attendance_flag = 1 and pe.workshop_attendance_flag = 0 ) as temp

insert into ac_attendance_record_temp (abnromal_attendance_record_id, employee_id, date, last_paragraph_end_time, first_time_from, first_time_to, extend1_time_flag, second_time_from, second_time_to, extend2_time_flag, third_time_from, third_time_to, extend3_time_flag, next_period_start_time, rest_flag, no_scheduling, rest_day_clock, all_day_no_clock, office_time_clock, no_clock_in, abnormal_clock_in_time, no_clock_after_work, alt_first_time_from, alt_first_time_to, alt_extend1_time_flag, alt_second_time_from, alt_second_time_to, alt_extend2_time_flag, alt_third_time_from, alt_third_time_to, alt_extend3_time_flag, alt_rest_day_flag, update_time, update_by, create_time, create_by) select #{recordId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, temp.pej_employee_id, temp.fds_date, null, temp.aea_first_time_from,temp.aea_first_time_to,temp.aea_extend1_time_flag, temp.aea_second_time_from,temp.aea_second_time_to,temp.aea_extend2_time_flag, temp.aea_third_time_from,temp.aea_third_time_to,temp.aea_extend3_time_flag, null,temp.aea_rest_day_flag, case when (temp.aea_id is null) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, 0, 0, 0, 0 ,0 ,0, temp.aea_first_time_from,temp.aea_first_time_to,temp.aea_extend1_time_flag, temp.aea_second_time_from,temp.aea_second_time_to,temp.aea_extend2_time_flag, temp.aea_third_time_from,temp.aea_third_time_to,temp.aea_extend3_time_flag,temp.aea_rest_day_flag, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} from (select emp_temp.*,
from (select
, pej.group_id as pej_group_id, pej.employee_id as pej_employee_id, pej.job_id as pej_fj_id, pej.job_name as pej_fj_job_name, pej.dept_id as pej_fd_id, pej.dept_name as pej_fd_dept_name, pej.remarks as pej_remarks, pej.attribute1 as pej_attribute1, pej.enabled_flag as pej_enabled_flag, pej.job_main_flag as pej_job_main_flag from fnd_dept_snapshot fds join pm_employee_job pej on fds.dept_id = pej.dept_id and pej.job_main_flag = 1 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and fds.date between #{startDate, jdbcType=DATE} and #{endDate, jdbcType=DATE} join pm_employee pe on pe.id = pej.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.work_attendance_flag = 1 and pe.workshop_attendance_flag = 1 join pm_employee_job_snapshot pejs on pejs.employee_id = pe.id and pejs.date = fds.date ) as emp_temp left join ac_employee_attendance aea on aea.regimea_date = emp_temp.fds_date and aea.regimea_date between #{startDate, jdbcType=DATE} and #{endDate, jdbcType=DATE} and aea.employee_id = emp_temp.pej_employee_id and aea.enabled_flag = 1 ) as temp
mapper.update: update ac_attendance_record_temp set abnromal_attendance_record_id = #{abnromalAttendanceRecordId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, date = #{date,jdbcType=DATE}, last_paragraph_end_time = #{lastParagraphEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, first_time_from = #{firstTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, first_time_to = #{firstTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, extend1_time_flag = #{extend1TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, second_time_from = #{secondTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, second_time_to = #{secondTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, extend2_time_flag = #{extend2TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, third_time_from = #{thirdTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, third_time_to = #{thirdTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, extend3_time_flag = #{extend3TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, next_period_start_time = #{nextPeriodStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, rest_flag = #{restFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, no_scheduling = #{noScheduling,jdbcType=BIT}, rest_day_clock = #{restDayClock,jdbcType=BIT}, all_day_no_clock = #{allDayNoClock,jdbcType=BIT}, office_time_clock = #{officeTimeClock,jdbcType=BIT}, no_clock_in = #{noClockIn,jdbcType=BIT}, abnormal_clock_in_time = #{abnormalClockInTime,jdbcType=BIT}, no_clock_after_work = #{noClockAfterWork,jdbcType=BIT}, alt_first_time_from = #{altFirstTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, alt_first_time_to = #{altFirstTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, alt_extend1_time_flag = #{altExtend1TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, alt_second_time_from = #{altSecondTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, alt_second_time_to = #{altSecondTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, alt_extend2_time_flag = #{altExtend2TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, alt_third_time_from = #{altThirdTimeFrom,jdbcType=TIME}, alt_third_time_to = #{altThirdTimeTo,jdbcType=TIME}, alt_extend3_time_flag = #{altExtend3TimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, alt_rest_day_flag = #{altRestDayFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

UPDATE aart SET aart.last_paragraph_end_time = (SELECT CASE WHEN (aa_e.time3 IS NOT NULL) THEN dbo.merge_date_time(aa_e.date, aa_e.time3, aa_e.extend3) ELSE CASE WHEN (aa_e.time2 IS NOT NULL) THEN dbo.merge_date_time(aa_e.date, aa_e.time2, aa_e.extend2) ELSE CASE WHEN (aa_e.time1 IS NOT NULL) THEN dbo.merge_date_time(aa_e.date, aa_e.time1, aa_e.extend1) ELSE NULL END END END FROM (SELECT aart_e.employee_id, aart_e.date, aart_e.alt_third_time_to AS time3, aart_e.alt_extend3_time_flag AS extend3, aart_e.alt_second_time_to AS time2, aart_e.alt_extend2_time_flag AS extend2, aart_e.alt_first_time_to AS time1, aart_e.alt_extend1_time_flag AS extend1 FROM ac_attendance_record_temp aart_e WHERE aart_e.alt_rest_day_flag = 0 AND aart_e.no_scheduling = 0 UNION ALL SELECT aarh_e.employee_id, aarh_e.date, aarh_e.alt_third_time_to AS time3, aarh_e.alt_extend3_time_flag AS extend3, aarh_e.alt_second_time_to AS time2, aarh_e.alt_extend2_time_flag AS extend2, aarh_e.alt_first_time_to AS time1, aarh_e.alt_extend1_time_flag AS extend1 FROM ac_attendance_record_history aarh_e WHERE aarh_e.alt_rest_day_flag = 0 AND aarh_e.no_scheduling = 0) aa_e WHERE aa_e.date = dateadd(DAY, -1, aart.date) AND aa_e.employee_id = aart.employee_id), aart.next_period_start_time = (SELECT CASE WHEN (aa_e.time1 IS NOT NULL) THEN dbo.merge_date_time(aa_e.date, aa_e.time1, 0) ELSE CASE WHEN (aa_e.time2 IS NOT NULL) THEN dbo.merge_date_time(aa_e.date, aa_e.time2, 0) ELSE CASE WHEN (aa_e.time3 IS NOT NULL) THEN dbo.merge_date_time(aa_e.date, aa_e.time3, 0) ELSE NULL END END END FROM (SELECT aart_e.employee_id, aart_e.date, aart_e.alt_third_time_from AS time3, aart_e.alt_second_time_from AS time2, aart_e.alt_first_time_from AS time1 FROM ac_attendance_record_temp aart_e WHERE aart_e.alt_rest_day_flag = 0 AND aart_e.no_scheduling = 0 UNION ALL SELECT aarh_e.employee_id, aarh_e.date, aarh_e.alt_third_time_from AS time3, aarh_e.alt_second_time_from AS time2, aarh_e.alt_first_time_from AS time1 FROM ac_attendance_record_history aarh_e WHERE aarh_e.alt_rest_day_flag = 0 AND aarh_e.no_scheduling = 0) aa_e WHERE aa_e.date = dateadd(DAY, 1, aart.date) AND aa_e.employee_id = aart.employee_id) FROM ac_attendance_record_temp aart where aart.alt_rest_day_flag = 0

UPDATE aart SET aart.rest_day_clock = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ac_clock_record acr WHERE acr.employee_id = aart.employee_id AND acr.date = aart.date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM ac_attendance_record_temp aart WHERE aart.alt_rest_day_flag = 1 AND aart.no_scheduling = 0

UPDATE aart SET aart.all_day_no_clock = CASE
WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ac_clock_record acr WHERE acr.employee_id = aart.employee_id AND acr.date = aart.date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM ac_attendance_record_temp aart WHERE aart.alt_rest_day_flag = 0 AND aart.no_scheduling = 0

UPDATE aart SET aart.office_time_clock = CASE /* 非休息日在上班时间内存在打卡 ，则异常 */ WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ac_clock_record acr WHERE acr.employee_id = aart.employee_id AND acr.date BETWEEN dateadd(DAY, -1, aart.date) AND dateadd(DAY, 1, aart.date) AND ( (dbo.merge_date_time(acr.date, acr.clock_time, 0) BETWEEN dbo.merge_date_time(aart.date, aart.alt_first_time_from, 0) AND dbo.merge_date_time(aart.date, aart.alt_first_time_to, aart.alt_extend1_time_flag) AND aart.alt_first_time_from IS NOT NULL AND aart.alt_first_time_to IS NOT NULL) OR (dbo.merge_date_time(acr.date, acr.clock_time, 0) BETWEEN dbo.merge_date_time(aart.date, aart.alt_second_time_from, 0) AND dbo.merge_date_time(aart.date, aart.alt_second_time_to, aart.alt_extend2_time_flag) AND aart.alt_second_time_from IS NOT NULL AND aart.alt_second_time_to IS NOT NULL) OR (dbo.merge_date_time(acr.date, acr.clock_time, 0) BETWEEN dbo.merge_date_time(aart.date, aart.alt_third_time_from, 0) AND dbo.merge_date_time(aart.date, aart.alt_third_time_to, aart.alt_extend3_time_flag) AND aart.alt_third_time_from IS NOT NULL AND aart.alt_third_time_to IS NOT NULL) ) ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM ac_attendance_record_temp aart WHERE aart.alt_rest_day_flag = 0 AND aart.no_scheduling = 0

UPDATE aart SET aart.no_clock_in = CASE WHEN NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ac_clock_record acr WHERE acr.employee_id = aart.employee_id AND acr.date BETWEEN dateadd([day], -1, aart.date) AND dateadd([day], 1, aart.date) AND dbo.merge_date_time(acr.date, acr.clock_time, 0) BETWEEN ISNULL(aart.last_paragraph_end_time, CASE WHEN dateadd([hour], -(#{amendHours,jdbcType=BIGINT}), dbo.merge_date_time(aart.date, aart.alt_first_time_from, 0)) <= aart.date THEN dateadd([hour], -(#{amendHours,jdbcType=BIGINT}), dbo.merge_date_time(aart.date, aart.alt_first_time_from, 0)) ELSE aart.date END) AND dbo.merge_date_time(aart.date, ISNULL(aart.alt_first_time_from, ISNULL(aart.alt_second_time_from, aart.alt_third_time_from)), 0) ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM ac_attendance_record_temp aart WHERE aart.alt_rest_day_flag = 0 AND aart.no_scheduling = 0 AND aart.last_paragraph_end_time IS NULL

UPDATE aart SET aart.abnormal_clock_in_time = CASE /* 上一天非休息日，结束时间到第一次开工时间打卡次数 = 0 或 %2 = 1 ，则异常 */ WHEN aart.last_paragraph_end_time IS NOT NULL AND (SELECT CASE clock_count WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE clock_count % 2 END FROM (SELECT COUNT(1) AS clock_count FROM ac_clock_record acr WHERE acr.employee_id = aart.employee_id AND acr.date BETWEEN dateadd(DAY, -1, aart.date) AND dateadd(DAY, 1, aart.date) AND dbo.merge_date_time(acr.date, acr.clock_time, 0) BETWEEN ISNULL(aart.last_paragraph_end_time, aart.date) AND dbo.merge_date_time(aart.date, ISNULL(aart.alt_first_time_from, ISNULL(aart.alt_second_time_from, aart.alt_third_time_from)), 0) ) AS temp) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE CASE /* 第1段时间to、第2段时间from为非空，之间打卡次数 %2 = 1 ，则异常 */ WHEN aart.alt_first_time_to IS NOT NULL AND aart.alt_second_time_from IS NOT NULL AND (SELECT COUNT(1) AS clock_count FROM ac_clock_record acr WHERE acr.employee_id = aart.employee_id AND acr.date BETWEEN dateadd(DAY, -1, aart.date) AND dateadd(DAY, 1, aart.date) AND dbo.merge_date_time(acr.date, acr.clock_time, 0) BETWEEN dbo.merge_date_time(aart.date, aart.alt_first_time_to, aart.alt_extend1_time_flag) AND dbo.merge_date_time(aart.date, aart.alt_second_time_from, 0)) % 2 = 1 THEN 1 ELSE CASE /* 第2段时间to、第3段时间from为非空，之间打卡次数 %2 = 1 ，则异常 */ WHEN aart.alt_second_time_to IS NOT NULL AND aart.alt_third_time_from IS NOT NULL AND (SELECT COUNT(1) AS clock_count FROM ac_clock_record acr WHERE acr.employee_id = aart.employee_id AND acr.date BETWEEN dateadd(DAY, -1, aart.date) AND dateadd(DAY, 1, aart.date) AND dbo.merge_date_time(acr.date, acr.clock_time, 0) BETWEEN dbo.merge_date_time(aart.date, aart.alt_second_time_to, aart.alt_extend2_time_flag) AND dbo.merge_date_time(aart.date, aart.alt_third_time_from, 0)) % 2 = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END END END FROM ac_attendance_record_temp aart WHERE aart.alt_rest_day_flag = 0 AND aart.no_scheduling = 0

UPDATE aart_u SET aart_u.no_clock_after_work = ( SELECT CASE WHEN aart.next_period_start_time IS NULL THEN CASE clock_count WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ELSE CASE clock_count WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE clock_count % 2 END END FROM ( SELECT COUNT(1) AS clock_count FROM ac_clock_record acr WHERE acr.employee_id = aart.employee_id AND acr.date BETWEEN dateadd([day], -1, aart.date) AND dateadd([day], 1, aart.date) AND dbo.merge_date_time(acr.date, acr.clock_time, 0) BETWEEN aart.off_time AND ISNULL(aart.next_period_start_time, CASE WHEN dbo.merge_date_time(aart.date, '23:59:59', 0) >= dateadd([hour], #{amendHours,jdbcType=BIGINT}, aart.off_time) THEN dbo.merge_date_time(aart.date, '23:59:59', 0) ELSE dateadd([hour], #{amendHours,jdbcType=BIGINT}, aart.off_time) END ) ) temp ) FROM ( SELECT aart_d.*, CASE WHEN aart_d.alt_third_time_to IS NOT NULL THEN dbo.merge_date_time(aart_d.date, aart_d.alt_third_time_to, aart_d.alt_extend3_time_flag) ELSE CASE WHEN aart_d.alt_second_time_to IS NOT NULL THEN dbo.merge_date_time(aart_d.date, aart_d.alt_second_time_to, aart_d.alt_extend2_time_flag) ELSE CASE WHEN aart_d.alt_first_time_to IS NOT NULL THEN dbo.merge_date_time(aart_d.date, aart_d.alt_first_time_to, aart_d.alt_extend1_time_flag) ELSE aart_d.date END END END AS off_time FROM ac_attendance_record_temp aart_d ) aart, ac_attendance_record_temp aart_u WHERE aart.id = aart_u.id AND aart.alt_rest_day_flag = 0 AND aart.no_scheduling = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ac_attendance_record_history (abnromal_attendance_record_id, employee_id, date, last_paragraph_end_time, first_time_from, first_time_to, extend1_time_flag, second_time_from, second_time_to, extend2_time_flag, third_time_from, third_time_to, extend3_time_flag, next_period_start_time, rest_flag, no_scheduling, rest_day_clock, all_day_no_clock, office_time_clock, no_clock_in, abnormal_clock_in_time, no_clock_after_work, alt_first_time_from, alt_first_time_to, alt_extend1_time_flag, alt_second_time_from, alt_second_time_to, alt_extend2_time_flag, alt_third_time_from, alt_third_time_to, alt_extend3_time_flag, alt_rest_day_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, commit_flag ) SELECT aart.abnromal_attendance_record_id, aart.employee_id, aart.date, aart.last_paragraph_end_time, aart.first_time_from, aart.first_time_to, aart.extend1_time_flag, aart.second_time_from, aart.second_time_to, aart.extend2_time_flag, aart.third_time_from, aart.third_time_to, aart.extend3_time_flag, aart.next_period_start_time, aart.rest_flag, aart.no_scheduling, aart.rest_day_clock, aart.all_day_no_clock, aart.office_time_clock, aart.no_clock_in, aart.abnormal_clock_in_time, aart.no_clock_after_work, aart.alt_first_time_from, aart.alt_first_time_to, aart.alt_extend1_time_flag, aart.alt_second_time_from, aart.alt_second_time_to, aart.alt_extend2_time_flag, aart.alt_third_time_from, aart.alt_third_time_to, aart.alt_extend3_time_flag, aart.alt_rest_day_flag, aart.create_time, aart.create_by, aart.update_time, aart.update_by, aart.attribute1, aart.attribute2, aart.attribute3, aart.attribute4, aart.attribute5, 0 FROM ac_attendance_record_temp aart join pm_employee_job pej on pej.employee_id = aart.employee_id where pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1

INSERT INTO ac_abnormal_clock_record (date, ac_attendance_record_history_id, clock_time, card_machine_no, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5) SELECT ISNULL (acr.date, aarh.date), aarh.ID, acr.clock_time, acr.card_machine_no, ISNULL (acr.create_time, GETDATE()), ISNULL (acr.create_by, -1), ISNULL (acr.update_time, GETDATE()), ISNULL (acr.update_by, -1), acr.attribute1, acr.attribute2, acr.attribute3, acr.attribute4, acr.attribute5 FROM ( SELECT aarh_d.*, CASE WHEN aarh_d.alt_third_time_to IS NOT NULL THEN dbo.merge_date_time(aarh_d.date, aarh_d.alt_third_time_to, aarh_d.alt_extend3_time_flag) ELSE CASE WHEN aarh_d.alt_second_time_to IS NOT NULL THEN dbo.merge_date_time(aarh_d.date, aarh_d.alt_second_time_to, aarh_d.alt_extend2_time_flag) ELSE CASE WHEN aarh_d.alt_first_time_to IS NOT NULL THEN dbo.merge_date_time(aarh_d.date, aarh_d.alt_first_time_to, aarh_d.alt_extend1_time_flag) ELSE aarh_d.date END END END AS off_time FROM ac_attendance_record_history aarh_d ) aarh LEFT JOIN ac_clock_record acr ON aarh.employee_id = acr.employee_id AND acr.date BETWEEN dateadd([day], -1, aarh.date) AND dateadd([day], 1, aarh.date) AND dbo.merge_date_time(acr.date, acr.clock_time, 0) BETWEEN ISNULL(aarh.last_paragraph_end_time, CASE WHEN dateadd([hour], -(#{amendHours,jdbcType=BIGINT}), dbo.merge_date_time(aarh.date, aarh.alt_first_time_from, 0)) <= aarh.date THEN dateadd([hour], -(#{amendHours,jdbcType=BIGINT}), dbo.merge_date_time(aarh.date, aarh.alt_first_time_from, 0)) ELSE aarh.date END) AND ISNULL(aarh.next_period_start_time, CASE WHEN dbo.merge_date_time(aarh.date, '23:59:59', 0) >= dateadd([hour], #{amendHours,jdbcType=BIGINT}, aarh.off_time) THEN dbo.merge_date_time(aarh.date, '23:59:59', 0) ELSE dateadd([hour], #{amendHours,jdbcType=BIGINT}, aarh.off_time) END) WHERE (aarh.no_scheduling = 1 --OR aarh.rest_day_clock = 1 OR aarh.all_day_no_clock = 1 OR aarh.office_time_clock = 1 OR aarh.no_clock_in = 1 OR aarh.abnormal_clock_in_time = 1 OR aarh.no_clock_after_work = 1) AND aarh.DATE >= #{dateFrom, jdbcType=DATE} AND aarh.DATE <= #{dateTo, jdbcType=DATE}
mapper.update: update aart set aart.alt_first_time_from = case when (DATEDIFF(mi, aart.alt_first_time_from, (select be_late_time from ac_be_late_date where id = #{lateId, jdbcType = BIGINT} ) ) >= 0 and DATEDIFF(mi, aart.alt_first_time_to, (select be_late_time from ac_be_late_date where id = #{lateId, jdbcType = BIGINT} ) ) < 0) then (select be_late_time from ac_be_late_date where id = #{lateId, jdbcType = BIGINT} ) else aart.alt_first_time_from end, aart.alt_second_time_from = case when (DATEDIFF(mi, aart.alt_second_time_from, (select be_late_time from ac_be_late_date where id = #{lateId, jdbcType = BIGINT} ) ) >= 0 and DATEDIFF(mi, aart.alt_second_time_to, (select be_late_time from ac_be_late_date where id = #{lateId, jdbcType = BIGINT} ) ) < 0) then (select be_late_time from ac_be_late_date where id = #{lateId, jdbcType = BIGINT} ) else aart.alt_second_time_from end, aart.alt_third_time_from = case when (DATEDIFF(mi, aart.alt_third_time_from, (select be_late_time from ac_be_late_date where id = #{lateId, jdbcType = BIGINT} ) ) >= 0 and DATEDIFF(mi, aart.alt_third_time_to, (select be_late_time from ac_be_late_date where id = #{lateId, jdbcType = BIGINT} ) ) < 0) then (select be_late_time from ac_be_late_date where id = #{lateId, jdbcType = BIGINT} ) else aart.alt_third_time_from end from ac_attendance_record_temp aart where aart.date = #{date, jdbcType = DATE} and ( convert(varchar(8),aart.alt_first_time_from, 114) = '08:15:00' or convert(varchar(8),aart.alt_second_time_from, 114) = '08:15:00' or convert(varchar(8),aart.alt_third_time_from, 114) = '08:15:00' )

update aart set aart.alt_first_time_to = case when (DATEDIFF(mi, aart.alt_first_time_from, (select be_late_time from ac_be_late_date where id = #{beforeId, jdbcType = BIGINT} ) ) > 0 and DATEDIFF(mi, aart.alt_first_time_to, (select be_late_time from ac_be_late_date where id = #{beforeId, jdbcType = BIGINT} ) ) <= 0) then (select be_late_time from ac_be_late_date where id = #{beforeId, jdbcType = BIGINT} ) else aart.alt_first_time_to end, aart.alt_second_time_to = case when (DATEDIFF(mi, aart.alt_second_time_from, (select be_late_time from ac_be_late_date where id = #{beforeId, jdbcType = BIGINT} ) ) > 0 and DATEDIFF(mi, aart.alt_second_time_to, (select be_late_time from ac_be_late_date where id = #{beforeId, jdbcType = BIGINT} ) ) <= 0) then (select be_late_time from ac_be_late_date where id = #{beforeId, jdbcType = BIGINT} ) else aart.alt_second_time_to end, aart.alt_third_time_to = case when (DATEDIFF(mi, aart.alt_third_time_from, (select be_late_time from ac_be_late_date where id = #{beforeId, jdbcType = BIGINT} ) ) > 0 and DATEDIFF(mi, aart.alt_third_time_to, (select be_late_time from ac_be_late_date where id = #{beforeId, jdbcType = BIGINT} ) ) <= 0) then (select be_late_time from ac_be_late_date where id = #{beforeId, jdbcType = BIGINT} ) else aart.alt_third_time_from end from ac_attendance_record_temp aart where aart.date = #{date, jdbcType = DATE} and ( convert(varchar(8),aart.alt_first_time_to, 114) = '17:00:00' or convert(varchar(8),aart.alt_second_time_to, 114) = '17:00:00' or convert(varchar(8),aart.alt_third_time_to, 114) = '17:00:00' )

update aarh set day_clock_time = isnull( STUFF(( SELECT ',' +
CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), aacr.date,120) + ' ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(8),aacr.clock_time , 108) FROM ac_abnormal_clock_record aacr WHERE aacr.ac_attendance_record_history_id = aarh.id order by aacr.date,aacr.clock_time FOR XML PATH ( '' )), 1, 1, '' ), '' ) from ac_attendance_record_history aarh where aarh.date between #{beginDate, jdbcType=DATE} AND #{endDate, jdbcType= DATE}
mapper.insert:
insert into ac_attendance_record_temp_archive(
[abnromal_attendance_record_id] ,[employee_id] ,[date] ,[last_paragraph_end_time] ,[first_time_from] ,[first_time_to] ,[extend1_time_flag] ,[second_time_from] ,[second_time_to] ,[extend2_time_flag] ,[third_time_from] ,[third_time_to] ,[extend3_time_flag] ,[next_period_start_time] ,[rest_flag] ,[no_scheduling] ,[rest_day_clock] ,[all_day_no_clock] ,[office_time_clock] ,[no_clock_in] ,[abnormal_clock_in_time] ,[no_clock_after_work] ,[alt_first_time_from] ,[alt_first_time_to] ,[alt_extend1_time_flag] ,[alt_second_time_from] ,[alt_second_time_to] ,[alt_extend2_time_flag] ,[alt_third_time_from] ,[alt_third_time_to] ,[alt_extend3_time_flag] ,[alt_rest_day_flag] ,[create_time] ,[create_by] ,[update_time] ,[update_by] ,[attribute1] ,[attribute2] ,[attribute3] ,[attribute4] ,[attribute5] ) select [abnromal_attendance_record_id] ,[employee_id] ,[date] ,[last_paragraph_end_time] ,[first_time_from] ,[first_time_to] ,[extend1_time_flag] ,[second_time_from] ,[second_time_to] ,[extend2_time_flag] ,[third_time_from] ,[third_time_to] ,[extend3_time_flag] ,[next_period_start_time] ,[rest_flag] ,[no_scheduling] ,[rest_day_clock] ,[all_day_no_clock] ,[office_time_clock] ,[no_clock_in] ,[abnormal_clock_in_time] ,[no_clock_after_work] ,[alt_first_time_from] ,[alt_first_time_to] ,[alt_extend1_time_flag] ,[alt_second_time_from] ,[alt_second_time_to] ,[alt_extend2_time_flag] ,[alt_third_time_from] ,[alt_third_time_to] ,[alt_extend3_time_flag] ,[alt_rest_day_flag] ,[create_time] ,[create_by] ,[update_time] ,[update_by] ,[attribute1] ,[attribute2] ,[attribute3] ,[attribute4] ,[attribute5] from ac_attendance_record_temp
mapper.update: UPDATE ac_attendance_record_history SET no_scheduling = 0, rest_day_clock = 0, all_day_no_clock = 0, office_time_clock = 0, no_clock_in = 0, abnormal_clock_in_time = 0, no_clock_after_work = 0 FROM ac_attendance_record_history aarh WHERE aarh.date > isnull( ( SELECT pel.quit_time FROM pm_employee pe LEFT JOIN pm_employee_leaveoffice pel ON pe.id = pel.employee_id AND pel.enabled_flag = 1 WHERE pe.id = aarh.employee_id AND pe.leave_flag = 1 AND pe.enabled_flag = 1 ), getdate () ) and aarh.date between #{beginDate, jdbcType=DATE} AND #{endDate, jdbcType= DATE}
